summary: package eu.kalafatic.evolution.controller.supervision; import eu.kalafatic.evolution.controller.orchestration.selfdev.BranchVariant; public class HighestScorePolicy implements ResolverPolicy { @Override public PolicyResult evaluate(BranchVariant variant) { return new PolicyResult(variant.getScore(), 1.0, "Aggregated AI-predicted score: " + variant.getScore()); } @Override public String getName() { return "HighestScorePolicy"; } }
evolutionaryNotes: Suggestion: Add @EvolutionComponent annotation to this high-importance class.
